ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill
Language: javascript
Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MobSF/Mobile-Security-Framework-MobSF
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MobSF/Mobile-Security-Framework-MobSF
Language: javascript
Mobile Security Framework (MobSF) is an automated, all-in-one mobile application (Android/iOS/Windows) pen-testing, malware analysis and security assessment framework capable of performing static and dynamic analysis.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Piebald-AI/claude-code-system-prompts
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Piebald-AI/claude-code-system-prompts
Language: javascript
All parts of Claude Code's system prompt, 27 builtin tool descriptions, sub agent prompts (Plan/Explore/Task), utility prompts (CLAUDE.md, compact, statusline, magic docs, WebFetch, Bash cmd, security review, agent creation). Updated for each Claude Code version.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/agent-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/agent-skills
Language: javascript
Expert-level WordPress knowledge for AI coding assistants - blocks, themes, plugins, and best practices

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
Language: javascript
Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills
Language: javascript
Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: earthtojake/text-to-cad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/earthtojake/text-to-cad
Language: javascript
A collection of agent skills for CAD, robotics and hardware design

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jnMetaCode/superpowers-zh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jnMetaCode/superpowers-zh
Language: javascript
🦸 AI 编程超能力 · 中文增强版 — superpowers（116k+ ⭐）完整汉化 + 6 个中国原创 skills，让 Claude Code / Copilot CLI / Hermes Agent / Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro / Gemini CLI 等 16 款 AI 编程工具真正会干活

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koodo-reader/koodo-reader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koodo-reader/koodo-reader
Language: javascript
A modern ebook manager and reader with sync and backup capacities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS and Web

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: truelockmc/streambert
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/truelockmc/streambert
Language: javascript
A cross-platform Electron Desktop App to stream and download any Movie, TV Series or Anime in the World. Zero Ads and Tracking
